stocks.impact_theory: Avis Budget reported strong Q1 earnings beating expectations due to surge in travel demand post-economic recovery signals. Economic implications include robust consumer spending; market psychology shows FOMO buying in travel stocks. Historical parallel: Post-COVID travel boom in 2021 lifted CAR +300%. Analogies: Like a rocket fueled by vacation fever; or a rental car line wrapping around the block during summer rush.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Web searches show CAR as top gainer +23% pre-market on earnings; X sentiment positive with high engagement on travel recovery. Limit 20 latest posts confirm hype.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Buy for 20% upside on continued travel boom.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Avoid or short if recession fears rise, potential -10%.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Economic slowdown reducing travel, fuel price spikes, competition from Turo.

stocks.justification: Strong mover data from searches, but small cap volatility lowers to B.

stocks.impact_theory: CEO abrupt resignation amid investigation into executive murder scandal erodes investor confidence. Economic implications: Regulatory scrutiny on healthcare giants; psychology: Fear of leadership vacuum. Historical: Wells Fargo CEO exit 2016 dropped 10%. Analogies: Captain abandoning ship mid-storm; or a hospital losing its top surgeon suddenly.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Recent news highlights CEO change as top story, stock down big recently; X posts show negative sentiment with calls to short.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Wait for dip buy at support, +8% recovery.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Short for 12% downside on ongoing probe.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Quick new CEO stabilizes, Medicare changes favorable.

stocks.justification: Clear negative catalyst with high visibility in searches.

stocks.impact_theory: Announcement of next-gen Blackwell AI chips with supply chain improvements amid AI hype. Implications: Accelerates AI adoption boosting data center spend; psychology: Continued AI euphoria. Parallel: Hopper launch 2022 +200% run. Analogies: Fueling the AI fire; like gasoline on tech rally bonfire.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Frequent mentions in movers, positive X buzz on AI future.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long calls for 15% gains on AI tailwinds.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Chip delays, competition from AMD, export restrictions.

stocks.justification: NVDA dominant in AI narrative across news.

stocks.impact_theory: Rumors of AI-integrated iPhone 18 features spark upgrade cycle. Implications: Boosts services revenue; psychology: Apple loyalists upgrade frenzy. Parallel: Vision Pro hype 2023. Analogies: New iPhone like Christmas for tech fans; siren call of innovation.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Listed in movers, positive analyst notes; X sentiment upbeat.

stocks.justification: Consistent performer but less explosive news.

stocks.impact_theory: AWS cloud growth accelerates with AI workloads; e-commerce steady. Implications: Margin expansion; psychology: Trust in Bezos-era dominance. Parallel: 2020 cloud surge. Analogies: AWS as the cloud kingpin; endless money printer for retail.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Mentions in movers, X posts highlight AWS strength.

potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Tariffs on imports, recession hitting retail.
